project_type: Java roguelike dungeon crawler game with libGDX (Phase 3 integration)
build_system: Gradle 8.14 (system), will create Gradle wrapper. Java 17 via mise (mise.toml already exists). No existing build.gradle.
test_framework: No tests yet in codebase. Verification is via successful compilation (./gradlew classes).
test_command: ./gradlew classes (no test suite exists, compile-check is the verification)
verification_instructions: 1. Run ./gradlew classes to ensure all source (model + controller + view) compiles. 2. Verify existing model/controller source files are unchanged (git diff on src/model/ and src/controller/). 3. Ensure the view layer contains all required files per the spec.
snapshot_or_generated_files: gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar and gradle-wrapper.properties are generated by 'gradle wrapper'. gradlew and gradlew.bat are also generated.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/Plague-of-Danjin. 2. mise use java@17 (already configured in mise.toml). 3. gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.11 to create wrapper. 4. ./gradlew classes to compile.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can download Gradle dependencies, libGDX jars from Maven Central. Java 17 via mise. System Gradle 8.14 available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: All existing src/model/ and src/controller/ must remain UNCHANGED. New view layer goes in src/view/. Zero game logic in view layer. No blocking calls or Thread.sleep in render thread.
key_patterns: MVC architecture: model/ has game entities (GameCharacter, Player, Enemy, items, skills, status), controller/ has CombatEngine (non-blocking state machine), events/ has a central event bus via GameEventDispatcher. CombatEngine extends GameEventDispatcher and acts as the central event bus. Packages use flat structure (no 'com.x' prefix) - just 'model', 'controller', 'model.events', etc. View layer should use 'view' package at same level.
directory_structure: src/model/ - game entities and data (GameCharacter, Player, Enemy, items/, skills/, status/, events/, enemies/). src/controller/ - game logic (CombatEngine, GameState, WaveManager, ChestSystem, EventRoomManager, RunModifiers). src/view/ - NEW: libGDX rendering layer to be created.
